case_title: PATRICIA B. WEBSTER VS. NKG AUTO REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WEBSTER, PATRICIA B. AS TO DEFENDANT NKG AUTO REPAIR (CHARLES) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NKG AUTO REPAIR (CHARLES)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY WEBSTER, PATRICIA B. NKG AUTO REPAIR (CHARLES)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 SERVED SEP-23-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NKG AUTO REPAIR (CHARLES)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KHALIL GHANAYEM--OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBSTER, PATRICIA B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NKG AUTO REPAIR (CHARLES) $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $465.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
